title: Appsmith Helm chart values
description: Partial schema. Currently validates only mongodbCommunity.* and mongodbOperator.enabled; all other properties are passed through without schema validation. Broader coverage is tracked as a follow-on.

mongodbOperator.description: MongoDB Kubernetes Operator subchart. Other properties are passed through to the upstream mongodb-kubernetes chart and are not validated here.

enabled.description: Install the MongoDB Kubernetes Operator subchart alongside this chart.

mongodbCommunity.description: MongoDBCommunity cluster configuration. Pair with mongodbOperator.enabled=true to bundle the operator, or supply your own. Preview feature — see docs/install-mongodb-operator.md.

name.description: Name of the MongoDBCommunity custom resource. When empty, defaults to '<release-fullname>-mongo'. Keep under 60 chars — derived resource names append suffixes like -password and -svc.

members.description: Number of replica set members. Defaults to 1 for low-footprint installs; set to 3 for production HA.

replicaSetName.description: Name of the MongoDB replica set.

auth.description: Authentication configuration for the MongoDB user Appsmith connects as.

database.description: Authentication database (also used as the connection path).

passwordSecretName.description: Name of an existing Secret containing the password (key: password). When empty, a pre-install Job generates a random password into a Secret named "{name}-password".

persistent.description: Persistence configuration for MongoDB data volumes.

storageSize.description: Storage size for each MongoDB replica PVC.

storageClass.description: StorageClass for MongoDB PVCs. Empty uses the cluster default (or global.storageClass).
